description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in black with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this velvet and glossy synthetic leather bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Handbag with one main zipped compartment that has two inner zipped pockets One zipped pocket at the back Two short handles for carrying ease Lace design and branding on the front Material and Care Velvet and glossy synthetic leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 19 cm Width: 36 cm Depth: 17 cm
